title: Cronquistianthus desmophyllus
taxonomy: Cronquistianthus desmophyllus belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is classified within the tribe Mutisieae. Cronquistianthus desmophyllus is further classified in the subtribe Mutisiinae. It is native to South America, specifically in the Andes mountain range. This species is also known by other names such as Mutisia desmophylla and Mutisia andina.
